text: Dolphins click and read echoes, revealing secrets of the ocean. Echolocating sounds travel through water, bouncing off objects. With clicks reaching over a mile, they create a mental map. Research shows these echoes help dolphins find prey in murky waters. In a world of darkness, echolocation lights their path. Curious about more marine wonders? Follow for deeper dives!
